items: Inspections should be performed before starting the engine or at least 3 minutes after stopping the engine.
It must be performed on a level surface with the engine stopped.

blocks.text: Pull out the oil level gauge and check for contamination and that the oil level is between the upper (A) and lower (B) limits. After wiping with a rag, insert the gauge and inspect. If the oil quantity is near the lower limit, refill to the upper limit.

items: Do not mix different brands or grades of oil, or use low-quality oil, as it will alter the quality and cause malfunctions.
Always check for oil leaks if the oil level is low.
